# Machine Accounting — Domain Reference

This document describes the Machine Accounting (MA) system's functionality, concepts, and operations independent of any specific user interface.

Machine Accounting is part of the IGT ADVANTAGE system. It manages the auditing and accounting of electronic gaming machines (EGMs) on a casino floor. The system collects financial data, meter readings, and machine events to support regulatory compliance and operational reporting.

## Scope

This reference covers:

- System concepts and architecture
- Configuration settings
- User and organizational management
- Machine maintenance and lifecycle
- EGM enable/disable and scheduling
- Pager and floor staff management
- The daily audit workflow (periods, meters, drops, variances, hand pays, vouchers, promotions)
- Reporting
- Progressive workbook tracking
